codeExample.title: Smart City Configuration
codeExample.subtitle: Define your smart city infrastructure with simple, declarative configuration
codeExample.code:
# Smart City Infrastructure Configuration
apiVersion: elemento.cloud/v1
kind: SmartCityPlatform
metadata:
  name: city-digital-infrastructure
spec:
  citizenServices:
    - name: eGovernment
      features: ["document-processing", "payment-gateway", "citizen-portal"]
      compliance: ["GDPR", "accessibility"]
    - name: healthcare
      features: ["patient-records", "telemedicine", "appointment-scheduling"]
      compliance: ["HIPAA", "GDPR"]
  iotIntegration:
    sensors: ["traffic", "air-quality", "noise", "weather"]
    dataRetention: "2y"
    encryption: "AES-256"
  analytics:
    realTime: true
    dashboards: ["city-operations", "citizen-services", "emergency-response"]
    reporting: "automated"
  security:
    dataSovereignty: true
    auditLogging: true
    accessControl: "role-based"

stats.title: Public Sector Impact

faq.title: Public Sector FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about using Elemento for government and smart city initiatives

items.question: How does Elemento ensure data sovereignty for government data?
items.answer: Elemento provides complete control over data location and processing with built-in sovereignty guarantees. Our platform ensures that all government data remains within your jurisdiction and under your complete control.

items.question: What compliance standards does Elemento support for government use?
items.answer: Elemento supports major government compliance standards including FedRAMP, GDPR, and national data sovereignty requirements. Our platform includes built-in controls and reporting capabilities to help you meet regulatory requirements.

items.question: Can Elemento integrate with existing government systems?
items.answer: Yes! Elemento provides seamless integration with existing government systems including legacy applications, citizen portals, and smart city infrastructure. Our APIs support government standards and protocols.

items.question: How does Elemento handle smart city IoT and sensor data?
items.answer: Elemento provides comprehensive IoT integration capabilities for smart city infrastructure including sensor data collection, real-time analytics, and citizen service optimization. Our platform supports millions of connected devices with secure data transmission.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to Transform Your Public Infrastructure?
ctaFinal.subtitle: Join leading government organizations already using Elemento to modernize their infrastructure and deliver better citizen services.

codeExample.title: Configurazione della città intelligente
codeExample.subtitle: Definisci la tua infrastruttura di città intelligente con una configurazione semplice e dichiarativa
codeExample.code:
# Smart City Infrastructure Configuration
apiVersion: elemento.cloud/v1
kind: SmartCityPlatform
metadata:
  name: city-digital-infrastructure
spec:
  citizenServices:
    - name: eGovernment
      features: ["document-processing", "payment-gateway", "citizen-portal"]
      compliance: ["GDPR", "accessibility"]
    - name: healthcare
      features: ["patient-records", "telemedicine", "appointment-scheduling"]
      compliance: ["HIPAA", "GDPR"]
  iotIntegration:
    sensors: ["traffic", "air-quality", "noise", "weather"]
    dataRetention: "2y"
    encryption: "AES-256"
  analytics:
    realTime: true
    dashboards: ["city-operations", "citizen-services", "emergency-response"]
    reporting: "automated"
  security:
    dataSovereignty: true
    auditLogging: true
    accessControl: "role-based"
